title: Guardianes del bloque
description: Immerse yourself in a unique experience with this Survival RPG modpack, specially designed for servers looking to deepen the adventure without losing the classic essence of Minecraft.
body:
Immerse yourself in a unique experience with this Survival RPG modpack, specially designed for servers looking to deepen the adventure without losing the classic essence of Minecraft.
Explore new areas, mysterious biomes, hidden structures, and territories full of dangers that will test your skills.

Level up, upgrade your equipment, discover special weapons and tools, face more challenging creatures, and progress as a true guardian of the block.
Each player will choose their own path: adventurer, explorer, warrior, or builder... but all must survive, cooperate, and conquer the unknown.

This modpack combines:

🌿 Pure survival, with improved resources, weather, and dangers.

⚔️ RPG elements, such as progression, skills, and special loot.

🗺️ New areas to explore, full of secrets, temples, dungeons, and surprises.

Perfect for servers looking for a more lively, challenging, and immersive experience, without losing compatibility or classic gameplay.

Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
